title: Droid's Ultimate Create Mod
description: The Ultimate combination of the best mods to create the best experience when playing with the Create mod!
body:
Welcome to Droid's Ultimate Create Mod!

This modpack is put together to create the best create mod experience out there.

This modpack focus completely on the create mod, where you can have endless possibilities. This modpack also includes most of the best quality of life mod available currently, making the experience immersive and unique. Together with countless structure mod, the world will be different to what you feel from normal vanilla, yet the world generation mods chosen do not add much new block type, so the terrain still fits into vanilla Minecraft nicely.

*This modpack is currently in early stage of development, bugs and changes may happen

**_Regular world backups are recommended, this applies to both singleplayer and servers_**

Modpack Highlight:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rlcHWapcrnU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

.
**IMPORTANT: There are 3 versions, one for singleplayer, one for client side, and one for server side. Make sure you download the correct one!!!**

**Singleplayer**: Versions with "Singleplayer" is only for playing singleplayer. Not suitable for servers or server joining clients. 

**Server**: Versions with "Server" is only for server side, which is where the Minecraft server is hosted. Not suitable for client side or single player.

**Client**: Versions with "Client" is only for client side, which is where a player joins a server that also have this modpack installed. Not suitable for singleplayer or server side.

RAM:
- Generally, the more the RAM, the better
- For singleplayer, minimum is 4GB (4096MB), suggested is 8GB (8192)
- For server side, the RAM requirement can vary due to amount of players, as well as server settings such as render distance. As a guideline, minimum is 4GB (4096MB), suggested is 6-8GB (6144-8192MB)
- For client side, minimum is 4GB (4096MB), suggested is 8GB (8192)

Notes for server hosting:
- This modpack included "chunky", which allows server to pre-generate chunks.
- Server hosters are recommended to pre-generate chunks around spawn to reduce lag when multiple players start loading chunks at the start of the server.
- However, please note that server file side will increase rapidly when chunks are loaded
- Although this modpack does not include any mods from the FTB series, feel free to add any that suits your gameplay. FTB mods are not inculded due to Modrinth policy.

If you have any problems or found bugs in the modpack, report it to the discord server by the invite link (Under "external resource").
